name: 比特羊

crawl_summary.source: Telegram Desktop export plus https://beet.select/ pagination
crawl_summary.notes: Telegram Desktop HTML export parsed 11027 messages across 2020-2026, including 2583 messages from 2023. Raw exports and full-text crawled JSON files are intentionally excluded from the public repository.

impression: 公开表达更像一个长期运行的产品雷达：早期强导购和好价阈值，后期扩展到 AI、硬件、线下摸机和小工具；短、快、具体，常用截图、链接、价格、SKU、实测感受和一句吐槽完成判断；对没验证的内容会保留 caveat。
knowledge_sources: Telegram Desktop export provided by the site/channel owner on 2026-07-02; raw export excluded from public repo
